creator: jgrosch@MooseRiver.com
text:
Current Jewish calendar file, /usr/share/calendar/calendar.judaic
is out of date. This file was current last year, ie. 1996-97 
(5757-58)

Fix: 

A diff and a complete replacement has been uploaded to incoming. 
Look at the files calendar.judaic.tgz and calendar.judaic.README
How-To-Repeat: N/A
